song.title: Angels We Have Heard on High
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G D7 G Angels we have heard on high .G D7 G D7 G Sweetly singing o'er the plains . D7 G And the mountains in reply, .G D7 G D7 G E_choing their joyous strains
[C] .G E7-Am D7-G C-C D7 Glo_________________ria .G - C G D7 In Excelsis Deo .G E7-Am D7-G C-C D7 Glo_______________________ria .G - C G D7 G In Excelsis De___o
[V2] Shepherds, why this jubilee? Why your joyous strains prolong? What the gladsome tidings be Which inspire your heavenly song?
[V3] Come to Bethlehem and see Him whose birth the angels sing Come, adore on bended knee Christ, the Lord, the newborn King
